sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Good, so the handle has returned to its original state:
- Large b segment: 14 pixels at cols 12-16
- Large S segment: 16 pixels at cols 13-16
- Small b segment: 2 pixels at row 19, cols 29-30
- Small S segment: 2 pixels at row 20, cols 29-30
This is the same as the initial state. The cycle is:
1. Initial: b/S, small (2 pixels)
2. Click on S segment: S/b, large (8 pixels)
3. Paint all 4 squares: back to b/S, small (2 pixels)
But the level doesn't advance. I need to try something different.
Let me try clicking on the b segment (not S) and see what happens. The b segment is at cols 12-16, rows 17-22.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking on the b segment of the handle to see if it toggles differently
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 19, 'col': 13}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
